userId.description: The system-generated unique ID of the user.

items.description: A list of personal access tokens (PATs) associated with the calling user identity.

nextToken.description: A token returned from a call to this API to indicate the next batch of results to return, if any.

expiresTime.description: The date and time when the personal access token will expire, in coordinated universal time (UTC) timestamp format as specified in RFC 3339.

identity.description: The system-generated unique ID of the user in Amazon CodeCatalyst.

secret.description: The secret value of the personal access token.

name.description: The friendly name of the personal access token.

expiresTime.description: The date and time the personal access token expires, in coordinated universal time (UTC) timestamp format as specified in RFC 3339. If not specified, the default is one year from creation.

status.description: The current status of the Dev Environment.

alias.description: The user-specified alias for the Dev Environment.

ides.description: Information about the integrated development environment (IDE) configured for the Dev Environment.

instanceType.description: The Amazon EC2 instace type to use for the Dev Environment.

inactivityTimeoutMinutes.description: The amount of time the Dev Environment will run without any activity detected before stopping, in minutes.

persistentStorage.description: Information about the amount of storage allocated to the Dev Environment. By default, a Dev Environment is configured to have 16GB of persistent storage.

vpcConnectionName.description: The name of the connection used to connect to Amazon VPC used when the Dev Environment was created, if any.

branchName.description: The name of the branch in a source repository cloned into the Dev Environment.

name.description: The name of the project in the space.

displayName.description: The friendly name of the project displayed to users in Amazon CodeCatalyst.

lastUpdatedTime.description: The time the source repository was last updated, in coordinated universal time (UTC) timestamp format as specified in RFC 3339.

createdTime.description: The time the source repository was created, in coordinated universal time (UTC) timestamp format as specified in RFC 3339.

https.description: The HTTPS URL to use when cloning the source repository.

regionName.description: The Amazon Web Services Region where the space exists.

displayName.description: The friendly name of the space displayed to users.

subscriptionType.description: The type of the billing plan for the space.

awsAccountName.description: The display name of the Amazon Web Services account used for billing for the space.

pendingSubscriptionType.description: The type of the billing plan that the space will be changed to at the start of the next billing cycle. This applies only to changes that reduce the functionality available for the space. Billing plan changes that increase functionality are applied immediately. For more information, see Pricing.

pendingSubscriptionStartTime.description: The day and time the pending change will be applied to the space, in coordinated universal time (UTC) timestamp format as specified in RFC 3339.

projectName.description: The name of the project in the space.

sourceRepositoryName.description: The name of the source repository where the workflow YAML is stored.

sourceBranchName.description: The name of the branch that contains the workflow YAML.

definition.description: Information about the workflow definition file for the workflow.

createdTime.description: The date and time the workflow was created, in coordinated universal time (UTC) timestamp format as specified in RFC 3339

lastUpdatedTime.description: The date and time the workflow was last updated, in coordinated universal time (UTC) timestamp format as specified in RFC 3339

runMode.description: The behavior to use when multiple workflows occur at the same time. For more information, see https://docs.aws.amazon.com/codecatalyst/latest/userguide/workflows-configure-runs.html in the Amazon CodeCatalyst User Guide.

path.description: The path to the workflow definition file stored in the source repository for the project, including the file name.

statusReasons.description: Information about the reasons for the status of the workflow run.

startTime.description: The date and time the workflow run began, in coordinated universal time (UTC) timestamp format as specified in RFC 3339

endTime.description: The date and time the workflow run ended, in coordinated universal time (UTC) timestamp format as specified in RFC 3339.

lastUpdatedTime.description: The date and time the workflow run status was last updated, in coordinated universal time (UTC) timestamp format as specified in RFC 3339

sizeInGiB.description:
The size of the persistent storage in gigabytes (specifically GiB).

Valid values for storage are based on memory sizes in 16GB increments. Valid values are 16, 32, and 64.

clientToken.description: A user-specified idempotency token. Idempotency ensures that an API request completes only once. With an idempotent request, if the original request completes successfully, the subsequent retries return the result from the original successful request and have no additional effect.

runtime.description:
A link to the IDE runtime image.

This parameter is not required for VSCode.

name.description: The name of the IDE. Valid values include Cloud9, IntelliJ, PyCharm, GoLand, and VSCode.
